chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.99 of 2023 M/s Al-Kausar Travel Guide Versus Standard Chartered Bank (Pakistan) Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 388/24 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 389/24 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 16.04.2024 None present. -.-.- On the first date of hearing counsel for the appellant has neither appeared nor made compliance. On the last date i.e. 15.02.2024 he undertook to make compliance of the office objections but today despite non-compliance, he has not even appeared. There is no intimation either. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
